violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager * had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoop needs to be in a container during pauses of use. Remove from top of ice maker.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) in walk-in-cooler was not properly date marked.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Desserts in the front cooler were not date marked.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken and missing floor tile by the mop sink.
Lighting. — --Light intensity for walk-in refrigeration or food storage area was insufficient. The light for the walk in freezer is not working.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop was stored on the floor by the mop sink.
